sections.paragraph:
ἀλίσγημα, ατος, τό (cp. Anecd. Gr. p. 377, 1; Hesych.; Suda; from ἀλισγέω ‘make ceremonially impure’ LXX) pollution ἀπέχεσθαι τῶν ἀ. τῶν εἰδώλων avoid pollution (pl. denotes separate acts) by images (of deities) Ac 15:20 (ἀπέχεσθαι ἐκ τῶν ἀλισγημάτων τῶν ἐθνῶν τῆς Βαβυλῶνος ParJer 7:37 [=7:32 H.]).

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Hesych Hesych , V a.d.—List 5

Suda Suda = a lexical work (freq. cited as Suidas in handbooks); X a.d.—List 5

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

  1. pl. = plural

ParJer ParJer = Paraleipomena Jeremiou, II? a.d.—List 2

  1. H. = FHort, s. W-H.—List 1, beg.

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 44
